title: 10 best herbal creams for white patches in month
description: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, creams helps with white patches in mouth because of its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream, which often contains sage extract, can reduce inflammation and fight off infections that cause white patches, such as oral thrush. By promoting a healthy oral environment, sage creams can help to prevent the recurrence of white patches and promote overall oral health.
